stemHtml: Disagreements are a fact of life. However, when a disagreement escalates into a conflict on the flight deck then safety is seriously compromised. Which of the following statements best describes the process of escalation in human conflict?

options.a: An initial tension or verbal dispute among opposing parties escalates to a voicing of hostile threats and may or may not involve violence.
options.b: Conflict escalation always involves acts of increasingly violent acts from all people involved.
options.c: Conflict escalation is about verbal confrontation around increasingly inflexible standpoints but does not involve violence.
options.d: The escalation of a disagreement into open conflict is most common when the people involved have different positions of authority.
